• 120x1 Vitamin C & Sweet Orange - Brightens, evens skin tone, and boost collagen production for visibly firmer, youthful skin. Experience 72 hours1 of deeply hydrated, dewy skin, and feel refreshed and radiant.
• 0% Alcohol, Parabens & Colorants
• Dermatologically Tested<
metaData.Preparation: Generously apply to body. Use twice daily for best results
